compounds.frequency: daily for loading phase, then 2x per week maintenance

benefits.description: Achieves tan without burning or with minimal burning when combined with 2-3 tanning sessions per week
Strong erectile response, described as 'hard on like viagra or cialis', lasts majority of the day, able to achieve multiple rounds quickly

side_effects.description: Darkens existing beauty marks, may bring out previously non-visible beauty marks

protocol_notes: 15-year user with consistent protocol. Loading phase: 0.5mg daily with 2-3 tanning sessions/week until desired tan achieved. Maintenance: 0.5mg 2x per week with 1x weekly tanning. Nausea and flushing last about 30 minutes post-injection. Strong libido effects when dosed before bed, effects last majority of day. Recommends this protocol minimizes burning.
